figures.caption: Figure 6: Visual comparison of Cond-Agg, Cond-Ind, and Cond-Step.
Figure 12: ALFWorld cumulative success rate (training set). Raw A→B (solid red) causes a persistent plasticity deficit that never recovers.
Figure 13: ALFWorld Task B: RR/NL dynamics over training. RR remains stable; the NL gap is the primary driver of negative FWT and persists throughout.

Figure 11: Retrieval diversity analysis (BabyAI, within-task setting). (a) Key diversity in storage (left marker of each pair) vs. effective context diversity at retrieval (right marker). For Task B under Cond-Ind, storage diversity is high (>0.91) but context diversity drops to 0.38. (b) Retrieval coverage: fraction of unique items among all retrievals. Cond-Ind × Task B retrieves only 13 unique items out of 240 (5.4%). (c) Top-1 concentration: 88.5% of Task B queries under Cond-Ind retrieve the identical item. (d) Within-task performance impact.
Table 8: Main hyperparameters used in our experiments.
